## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

---

## Problem or opportunity

What problem does this solve?

---

## Proposed solution

Describe the expected solution.

---

## Alternatives considered

Mention any alternative approach if applicable.

---

## Pages or files affected

- index.html
- soluciones.html
- pymes.html
- empresas.html
- styles.css
- script.js
- diagnosticos.js

---

## Business value

Explain how this improves the project, user experience or SAO's commercial positioning.

---

## Additional context

Add references, screenshots or notes if needed.
